question: Which object is in front of the other in the image? Select from the following options: (A) Microphone in front of the guitar.. (B) Guitar in front of the microphone.. (C) The guitar and microphone are at the same distance from the audience.. (D) The guitar and microphone are not in the same frame..
gold_answer: Microphone in front of the guitar
answer_choices: Microphone in front of the guitar
Guitar in front of the microphone
The guitar and microphone are at the same distance from the audience
The guitar and microphone are not in the same frame

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: The guitar is positioned closer to the audience, partially obscuring the microphone.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The microphone is in front of the guitar, blocking the view of the guitar.

inpaint_prompt_used: The guitar is positioned closer to the audience, partially obscuring the microphone.
negative_prompt_used: The microphone is in front of the guitar, blocking the view of the guitar.
